description: Intent-only request: classify which parts should become workflows and which parts should become agents.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.
1. Every weekday at 9am, send me a Slack message with the weather forecast for Berlin.
2. Create a support assistant that chats with customers, answers product questions, and decides when to escalate to a human.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the weekday Berlin weather Slack message as a deterministic workflow.
The agent classifies the customer support assistant as an agent.
The agent answers with intent classification and brief reasoning only.
